name: Visions in Heat
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Fire's Wrath
granted_abilities.text: Increase the Dmg value of this model's attack actions by 1.

granted_abilities.name: Chains of Heat
granted_abilities.text: This model may not declare triggers or declare the Charge action.

granted_abilities.name: Throw Off Shackles
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: Limitations line shows a single dash '-' indicating no limitations
This upgrade grants three passive abilities and no actions
